subject: A large stylized purple jar emitting swirling energies, with an anime figure partially visible, from Mob Psycho 100
description: A large, rounded purple jar or vessel dominates the center of the image, its wide lid sealed shut as swirling blue and violet energies radiate around and from it. The background is dark with dynamic speed lines or motion streaks suggesting kinetic energy. An anime-style figure is partially visible at the composition's edge — a character in dark clothing whose hands appear to be near or holding the jar — but the focal point is clearly the vessel itself. The overall tone is dramatic and dangerous, with the contained energy implying something volatile or supernatural within the jar.
foreground: large rounded purple jar with swirling violet and blue energy emanations
background: dark background with motion streaks and energy lines
